creator: devzone.my@gmail.com
text:
sysctl not work change kern.ipc.{maxsockets,nmbclusters,nmbjumbop} on sysctl

How-To-Repeat: # service sysctl restart
/etc/rc.d/sysctl: WARNING: unable to set kern.ipc.maxsockets=204800
/etc/rc.d/sysctl: WARNING: unable to set kern.ipc.nmbclusters=65000
/etc/rc.d/sysctl: WARNING: unable to set kern.ipc.nmbjumbop=32768
